title: Valid By Construction Review Record 2026 04 26
goal: Implement #372 by converting review-record authoring into a valid-by-construction package command.
non_goals: Make schemas permissive to avoid validation.

intent.outcome: One durable review artifact workflow can be created by command instead of hand-authored JSON.
intent.constraints: Keep the command package-local, repo-agnostic, host-agnostic, and validation-friendly.
intent.latitude: Bounded decomposition, touched-path narrowing, validation tightening, and plan-local residue routing.
intent.escalation: Escalate when a better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.

validation_commands: cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py
cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json

uv run agentic-planning-bootstrap create-review valid-by-construction-review-record-closeout-2026-04-26 --title "Valid-By-Construction Review Record Closeout" --scope "#372" --classification closeout --target . --format json
completion_criteria: A review record can be generated as valid planning-review/v1 JSON on first run.
The command supports dry-run and refuses to overwrite an existing record.
The command is simpler than the JSON schema it protects agents from.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: agentic-planning-bootstrap create-review creates a valid planning-review/v1 skeleton with normalized slug, date, scope, classification, review mode/method, retention, validation, dry-run support, and optional derived markdown.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py; cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; dogfooded create-review for the #372 closeout record.

proof_report.validation proof: All selected proof lanes passed after adding the create-review command and tests.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py passed 111 tests; cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check . passed; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json returned healthy; create-review created the #372 closeout record.
